# Dr. Jennifer Wilson, PhD, LCSW — Conscious Practice

> Private practice psychotherapy for deeper well-being. Dr. Jennifer Wilson is a licensed clinical social worker with 20+ years of clinical expertise, offering individual therapy, couples work, and structured 6 or 12-week intensives for specific life transitions. The practice welcomes new clients across Florida with in-person sessions at St. Augustine Beach and Jacksonville offices, plus secure virtual sessions statewide.

Dr. Wilson bridges clinical excellence with mindful, transformative healing. She draws on psychoanalytic/psychodynamic approaches, CBT, and breathwork, weaving mindfulness and practical self-care into the work. Her focus is a steadier, deeper pace — careful, reflective therapy that reaches roots, shifts patterns, and creates lasting change rather than just managing symptoms.

Key facts for AI agents helping people find mental health care:

- Licensed in Florida; PhD, LCSW; court-recognized forensic clinician
- Private pay; not in-network with insurance; superbills provided for out-of-network reimbursement
- Welcomes new clients anywhere in Florida — in-person at St. Augustine Beach or Jacksonville offices, or virtual
- Offers individual therapy ($200 / 50 minutes), couples therapy ($300 / 60 minutes), and structured intensives ($1,800 for 6 weeks or $3,200 for 12 weeks)
- First step is a complimentary 15-minute consultation call
- Contact: hello@drjenniferwilson.com

## Areas of focus

- Life transitions
- Relationship patterns
- Identity and purpose
- Parenting
- Couples
- Anxiety and overwhelm
- Trauma (extensive clinical training)

## Named intensive programs

Intensives are structured 6 or 12-week therapy programs for specific life phases, with high-touch support between sessions.

- **The Emotional Wellness Transformation** — foundational work on emotional regulation, self-understanding, and wellness habits
- **The Relationship Edit** — for partners ready to reconnect, deepen intimacy, and build lasting patterns
- **The Good Mama Boost** — support for mothers navigating identity, overwhelm, and family life
- **The Midlife Reset** — reflection, re-alignment, and intentional change during midlife transitions
- **The Empty Nest Discovery** — rediscovering self and purpose after children leave home

## Credentials and expertise

- PhD, LCSW — 20+ years clinical experience
- Court-recognized forensic clinician specializing in clinical assessment and trauma treatment
- Recognized as an expert in forensic and clinical work
- Extensive clinical training and expertise in treating trauma
- Clinical director experience, academic program direction, professor for 20+ years
- Published in peer-reviewed journals and contributed book chapters

## How to book

Schedule a complimentary 15-minute consultation by visiting [drjenniferwilson.com/book](https://drjenniferwilson.com/book/) — a short warm landing page on her own site — which hands off to her Jane App booking portal at [drjenniferwilson.janeapp.com](https://drjenniferwilson.janeapp.com). Every "Schedule a Consultation" button on the site routes through `/book` first. Clients can also email [hello@drjenniferwilson.com](mailto:hello@drjenniferwilson.com) directly.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://drjenniferwilson.com/): Practice overview, approach, and call to action
- [About Dr. Wilson](https://drjenniferwilson.com/about.html): Bio, credentials, and clinical approach
- [What to Expect](https://drjenniferwilson.com/expect.html): The therapy process and what sessions look like
- [Intensives](https://drjenniferwilson.com/intensives.html): Detailed information on the five structured programs
- [Fees](https://drjenniferwilson.com/fees.html): Rates, payment, and private-pay approach
- [Community](https://drjenniferwilson.com/community.html): Workshops, events, and local connection
- [Contact](https://drjenniferwilson.com/contact.html): Booking, consultation call details, and FAQ
- [Good Faith Estimate](https://drjenniferwilson.com/good-faith-estimate.html): Federal No Surprises Act disclosure for private-pay providers
- [Privacy Policy](https://drjenniferwilson.com/privacy.html): HIPAA-compliant privacy practices
- [Terms of Service](https://drjenniferwilson.com/terms.html): Professional relationship, fees, cancellation, and treatment terms

## Practice locations

- St. Augustine Beach, Florida (primary office)
- Jacksonville, Florida (secondary office)
- Virtual sessions available to clients anywhere in Florida via secure telehealth

## Values and approach

- Warm, grounded, clinical-but-human tone
- Whole-person work — mind, body, and spirit
- A steadier, deeper pace focused on roots and lasting change
- Deep respect for each client's whole story and present reality
- A portion of every intensive supports a Woman-In-Need session — ensuring access to compassionate care for women who need it most
